title: CivicPress Meeting Record Type Schema
description: JSON Schema for meeting-type records. A meeting is a scheduled civic event that owns 0..N session recordings (linked via the base record `linked_records` field, type=session). Base record fields are defined in record-base-schema.json. SCAFFOLD: recurring schedules, agenda↔transcript alignment, and device schedule-push are deliberately out of scope here (see docs/specs/2026-06-26-broadcast-box-meeting-model-design.md).

scheduled_start.description: ISO 8601 scheduled start of the meeting

scheduled_end.description: ISO 8601 scheduled end of the meeting

location.description: Where the meeting takes place (e.g., 'Council Chamber')
